descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 5-3 in Centennial Cup playoff, taking 3-2 series lead.
descriptionLong: Matt Hervey scored two goals to lead the Richmond Sockeyes to a 5-3 victory over the Humboldt Broncos in Centennial Cup Western Canada final playoff action on April 27, 1987. The win gave Richmond a 3-2 lead in the best-of-seven series after Humboldt had tied it 2-2 the previous day. Game 6 was scheduled for Tuesday night in Richmond.

attribution.headline: RICHMOND SOCKEYES EDGE HUMBOLDT IN CENTENNIAL CUP PLAYOFF
